action_plan.recommended_change: Do NOT pause this week. First conversion on primary keyword after 4+ weeks. Monitor for 2 more weeks to confirm it's a trend, not noise.

action_plan.recommended_change: Pause these 2 zero-conversion keywords immediately. Free up $24/week budget to concentrate on the primary keyword that just converted.
action_plan.rationale: While primary keyword showed its first conversion, these two long-tail variants still zero. Concentrating budget on 'wireless cat water fountain' only may improve conversion rate further.

action_plan.recommended_change: Reduce daily budget from $15 to $5. Auto campaign continues with zero conversions.
action_plan.rationale: Auto campaign at $15/day overspending for 0% ad CVR. $5/day cap preserves data collection at lower cost.

action_plan.recommended_change: Add as exact-match at $0.75 bid. SV 7,200, 7/10 competitors ranking. Title already mentions 'battery-operated' — may already index.

action_plan.rationale: Paw Pure lacks motion sensor, app, and wastewater separation — irrelevant traffic wastes budget.
